blended.narrative: Lakeridge is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
